details.author: Divyam Goyal
details.shortDescription: Manage per-channel sticky messages with text, embeds, attachments, cooldowns, ignored roles, and timed resends.
details.longDescription: Adds a slash command to create and manage sticky messages per channel. Supports text, embed, and attachment stickies, message cooldowns, ignored roles, timed resend mode, enable/disable toggles, and persistent sticky state.
